name: GKD增强订阅（合并版）

globalGroups.name: 开屏广告
globalGroups.desc: 点击跳过应用启动时的开屏广告

rules.name: 字节SDK

anyMatches: @View[text=null][clickable=true][childCount=0][visibleToUser=true][width<200&&height<200] +(1,2) TextView[index=parent.childCount.minus(1)][childCount=0] <n FrameLayout[childCount>2][text=null][desc=null] >(n+6) [text*="第三方应用" || text*="扭动手机" || text*="点击或上滑" || text*="省钱好物"][visibleToUser=true]

rules.name: 互动广告SDK
